content:
Post 1

ASX 200 barely moved Thursday — up just 1.60pts to 8,724.50 — but underneath, gold stocks surged while utilities collapsed 3.58%. Flat index, violent rotation. #ASX #ausbiz

Post 2

🟢 Financials led at +1.17%. 🔻 Utilities cratered 3.58%, Consumer Discretionary fell 2.17%, IT dropped 1.14%. Broad selling outside banks — rotation, not rally. #ASX #ausbiz

Post 3

⛏️ NST surged +5.48% to AUD19.83 as gold hit AUD5,910.28/oz. Northern Star was the clearest beneficiary of the metals bid — five gold names in the top five movers. #ASX #gold #mining

Post 4

🪙 Gold AUD5,910.28/oz. Silver AUD87.22/oz. Platinum AUD2,414.51/oz. AUD/USD at 0.6888. Metal prices driving the session's only real winners. #gold #silver #metals #ASX

Post 5

Gold at AUD5,910/oz is the line. If it holds, gold miners lead again Friday. If AUD firms past 0.69, that tailwind fades fast. Which way do you see it breaking? #gold #ASX #ausbiz
